content:
Complete the given **Cart** class by adding new features by following the given instructions.

**Existing _Cart_ class**:

The existing **Cart** class has only a _pass_ statement. Remove the _pass_ statement and add the new features as mentioned in the given instructions.

<details>

<summary>**Features to be added to _Cart_ class**</summary>

- **Add below attributes**
   - The **Cart** class should have the following attribute:
     - `items`: a dictionary to store items with their names as keys and prices as values.

- **Add below methods**
   - `add_item(self, item_name, price)`: Adds an item to the cart.
   - `update_item(self, item_name, price)`: Updates the price of an existing item in the cart.
   - `show_items(self)`: Prints all items in the cart.
   - `total_price(self)`: Returns the total price of all items in the cart.

</details>

<MultiLineNote>

- Do not edit the `default_test` function as this will effect the test cases.
- The output of the testcase **Checking Default Tests** is given by the `default_test` function in the prefilled code. Do not **edit or delete** the `default_test` function.
- This Coding question does not have the usual input/output testcases. The class defined by you will be tested internally whether the attributes are present or not. So in testcases results, you will be shown the rough description of the tests that will be verified.
</MultiLineNote>
---

test_cases.input: Checking if correct attribute names are used
